generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO cybersecurity advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy strengthens our national security. Investing in our own defenses isn't just about technology—it's about preserving our sovereignty and ensuring we're not caught in the crossfire of great-power conflicts. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
